responsibilities: Manage live trading books across equities, futures, or options while monitoring real-time risk exposure and P&L performance
Design and refine systematic trading strategies using statistical models to capture short-term and medium-term market inefficiencies
Execute discretionary and algorithmic trades while dynamically adjusting position sizing based on volatility and liquidity conditions
Monitor intraday market events and macroeconomic data releases to adjust trading positions and hedge portfolio risk
Backtest and stress-test new trading strategies against historical data before allocating capital for live deployment
Collaborate with quant researchers and developers to enhance signal quality and improve trade execution algorithms
Conduct daily post-trade analysis to evaluate strategy performance, slippage, and adherence to risk limits
Identify and exploit arbitrage opportunities across correlated instruments using real-time pricing discrepancies
